sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94851" key="skiatrofi/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐᾱτροφ-ίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκιατραφής</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:147" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.147</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:185" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.185</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
